title: Outposts & Stations
noAudio: Audio is unavailable in this browser
profTagline: A software generator of sci-fi station ambience for focus and sleep. Board a reactor core, a command bridge, a cryo bay or a derelict freighter — its hull rumble, ventilation, detuned reactor drone, servos, telemetry and deep-space signal are synthesised live from equal-temperament tunings, no files, offline. Six macro faders shape the mix; stations morph seamlessly.
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
